summary: EXP-165 adds a protocol-deviation-after-unblinding paragraph explicitly preempting the 'CERN excludes preliminary runs / medical trials exclude screen failures' defense. The paragraph notes that the dome's excluded items (W019, W020, W024, W027) were originally tracked as active predictions with test windows, and were only reclassified as 'refined' after they failed — which in clinical-trial terminology is protocol deviation after unblinding and invalidates the analysis. Cross-references SEC-6.5.
summary_note: Primary expansion for this issue is EXP-166.json (ready-for-integration, section_6_6_patch schema). EXP-165-sec-6-6.json is a supplementary second-opinion from a later analyst run addressing the same two holes — same analytical conclusions, single-block replacement_html form.
